name: Cream of Crab Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the bouillon cube in boiling water.
2. Cook the chopped onion in butter until tender.
3. Blend in the flour and celery salt, along with a dash of pepper.
4. Gradually add milk to the mixture while stirring constantly.
5. Add the dissolved bouillon and cooked crabmeat to the soup.
6. Continue cooking until thickened.
7. Garnish with chopped parsley before serving.
